title: New Application
subtitle: Complete all steps to submit your application

profileSection.title: Your Details (Auto-filled from profile)
profileSection.updateNote: To update your details, please visit your profile page.

errors.districtRequired: District is required from your profile

step2.firHint: Must start with 'FIR' and be at least 8 characters (e.g., FIR12345)
step2.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe the incident in detail...
step2.firNotRequired: FIR Number not required for Inter-Caste Marriage applications

errors.descriptionMinLength: Incident description must be at least 10 characters

step3.title: Document Checklist
step3.subtitle: Upload required documents below. They will be saved to the database when you submit the application.

errors.documentsRequired: Please upload all required documents. Missing: {missing}
errors.invalidFileType: Please upload PDF, JPG, or PNG files only
errors.fileSizeExceeded: File size must be less than 10MB

toasts.uploadSuccess: Document uploaded! It will be saved when you submit the application.
toasts.digilockerSuccess: Document imported from DigiLocker! It will be saved when you submit the application.
toasts.viewFailed: Failed to load document. Please try again.

step4.title: Bank Account Details
step4.subtitle: Provide your bank account details for benefit transfer. Your details {status}.
step4.statusAutoFilled: have been auto-filled from your profile
step4.statusWillBeSaved: will be saved to your profile when you submit
step4.accountHolderPlaceholder: Full name as per bank account

errors.accountNumberMinLength: Account number must be at least 9 digits
errors.accountNumberMaxLength: Account number must not exceed 18 digits
errors.accountNumberDigitsOnly: Account number must contain only digits
errors.ifscLength: IFSC code must be exactly 11 characters
errors.ifscFormat: IFSC code must start with 4 letters, followed by 0, then 6 alphanumeric characters (e.g., SBIN0001234)

declaration.text: I declare that all the information provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
declaration.error: You must accept the declaration to proceed

messages.bankDetailsSaved: Bank details saved to your profile!
messages.bankSaveWarning: Warning: Bank details could not be saved to profile
